title: The Most Powerful Claude Code Feature In Months Dropped & Nobody is Talking About It
summary: Graphify is a non-RAG approach for analyzing large codebases and storing information as knowledge graphs. The feature improves Claude Code's memory limitations and generates more accurate responses with lower token consumption. It enables knowledge graph creation from code analysis without retrieval-augmented generation.
